entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING, THEN SHOWERS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
TEMPERATURE FALLING INTO THE UPPER 50S IN THE AFTERNOON
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH, BECOMING NORTHWEST IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS AROUND 40
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS AROUND 60
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 50S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
